title: String boundary in AppEvent is correct: HashMap Borrow workarounds avoided
description: Using String (not Id) for all event ID fields in AppEvent is correct. AppState.typing_indicators is HashMap<(String,String),Instant> and .presence is HashMap<String,ContactPresence>. HashMap::remove requires the key type or a Borrow impl. (String,String) does not implement Borrow<(Id,Id)> in std, so using Id for these keys would require .to_string() at every insert/remove anyway. The Id→String conversion at event construction (one per event) is the right place for it.
